plugins.name: Writing Quality
plugins.description: AI writing-pattern detection + 5-dimension quality scoring (Directness, Rhythm, Trust, Authenticity, Density).

plugins.name: Screen Record
plugins.description: Screen recording on the agent VM via ffmpeg x11grab — start, stop, list recordings.

plugins.name: Computer Use
plugins.description: Screenshot + mouse/keyboard control of the agent's X desktop (DISPLAY=:10) for driving local GUI/RDP windows — capture, click, move, type, clipboard, batch. Opt-in, no role.
